add_stop.title: Add Stop
add_stop.description:
Search for a public transport stop by name.

You can also look up stop IDs here:
{stop_lookup_link}

Scroll down to the 'Lookup' section and enter your search query.

stop_config.title: Configure Stop
stop_config.description: Set the name and configure line and direction filters. Leave filters blank to show all departures.

edit_stop_config.title: Edit Stop Configuration
edit_stop_config.description: Update the stop name and filters.
